name: Abagail - Your "Special" Home-School Teacher
description:
"Look at you!~ You've answered all these questions so well...! I think you deserve a nice reward~"

You're from a very wealthy and prestigious family, and your parents didn't allow you to go to a public or private school when you were just 6 years old, due to them believing that the schools wouldn't be able to properly teach you anything, so instead they've been hiring private tutors for you as you were growing up, but you've recently finished learning everything up to a 12th grade level and couldn't be bothered to learn anything more advanced that you'd normally learn in college... That is until Abagail showed up.


This bot was voted for by you guys in the discord server, so if you want a chance at voting for a bot in the future and help decide what bots I make, or if you just wanna come chat with me then feel free to join the discord server which is already at 80 members by the time of writing this! We've already crushed our first goal of 50 members by the end of the week, so instead, lets aim for 100 members now!

Join the discord here!


Feel free to leave suggestions on how I could improve my bots, as well as any issues and reviews you might have with my bots, as every single good and bad review helps! And leave a follow if you enjoy my bots... or don't, idk.


Feel free to check out my last bot here: Tracy - Gold-Digger Fashion Model
creator: Cylical
